subcodes.first_line: O Thou sanctified Lord! From its earliest days, Thou didst make the soil of Persia to be musk scented and soul stirring, gem laden and knowledge bearing
subcodes.first_line_orig: پاک یزدانا خاک ایران را از آغاز مشکبیز فرمودی و شورانگیز و دانش خیز و گوهرریز
subcodes.subjects: @past, present and future of Iran, @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @spiritual transformation, @education of children; moral education, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
